case_title: JAMES E BIGGINS VS. ALFONSO PORTILLO et al

docket_entries.description: ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JUN-24-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING SEP-03-2003 AT 1:30PM. THIS DISMISSAL IS PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST JAMES E BIGGINS FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUN-24-2003 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-09-2003. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY NOREEN IKEUYE, CSR #3538. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-03-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUL-18-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
